news.heading: News - Top Headlines
news.searchPlaceholder: Search category e.g. sports, business, technology
about.title: About NewsApp
about.subtitle: Your daily source for top headlines from around the United States - fast, simple, and always up to date.
about.feature1Desc: Get the latest top stories from trusted news sources, refreshed throughout the day.
about.feature2Desc: Filter news by category - sports, business, technology, health, and more.
about.feature3Desc: Clean card layout with summaries and one-click access to full articles.
about.whoWeAreDesc: NewsApp is a news reader built with React. We bring you the latest top headlines from trusted sources so you can stay informed without the clutter of ads and distractions.
about.offer1: ✓ Top headlines from live news sources
about.offer2: ✓ Browse by category - sports, business, technology, and more
about.offer3: ✓ Clean card layout with quick access to full articles
about.offer4: ✓ Pagination for easy browsing through multiple stories
about.ourMissionDesc: We believe staying informed should be easy. NewsApp is designed to help you discover the stories that matter most - quickly, clearly, and in one place.
footer.tagline: Stay updated with the latest top headlines from trusted sources.
